description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a dark, angular fuselage and sharply swept wings that feature translucent blue panels. The wings are mid-mounted and extend outward with a pronounced anhedral angle, giving the aircraft an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The nose is pointed and features two forward-projecting antennae or probes, while the cockpit is positioned at the front and appears to be enclosed with a tinted canopy. The tail section is split, with twin vertical stabilizers and no visible horizontal stabilizer, contributing to a unique H-tail configuration. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or integrated into the body, and the engines are not externally prominent, possibly integrated within the fuselage or wings.
description: A dark, angular airplane with swept, translucent blue wings and a pointed nose, featuring a split H-tail and a forward, enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and the wide, swept wings with blue panels extending outward.
description_view_1: Side angle highlights the angular fuselage, forward-projecting antennae, and the mid-mounted, swept wings with visible blue surfaces.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the split H-tail configuration and the full span of the swept wings with their blue panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle again shows the angular body, swept wings, and the distinctive twin vertical stabilizers at the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, sharply swept wings with pronounced anhedral angle and translucent blue panels; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: No externally visible engines; possible integrated jet or electric propulsion within fuselage or wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers and no visible horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable or integrated.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy, likely single-seat.
